title: Summarize Online Review with Ratings and Recommendations
scenario: Write a prompt to summarize an online product review. The target output should include the reviewer's name, rating, main points, and recommendations. The output should be in a concise format and include relevant keywords. Limit the prompt to 80 words.
constraints: Must include the reviewer's name and rating
Must have at least 2 main points and recommendations

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the reviewer's name and rating are included
Assess if the main points are accurate and concise
Evaluate if the recommendations are relevant and helpful
